subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who standeth alone in a singleness which all created things have recognized, and Who is unique in a oneness which all existence hath known [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تفرد لا بالتفرید الذی عرفته الکائنات و توحد لا بالتوحید الذی
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
